title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Release Notes links on DFU screen do not open the correct web pages for Osprey EB and CC devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate the DFU (Device Firmware Update) notification or banner indicating an update is available for the connected device.
3. Tap the Update button on the Home screen to open the DFU screen.
4. On the DFU screen, tap the Release Notes link.
5. Verify that the correct web page opens in the default browser for the connected device (e.g., Osprey EB or CC).
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to the Settings screen (tap the gear icon or menu).
8. From the Settings screen, locate and tap the DFU / Firmware Update option.
9. On the DFU screen, tap the Release Notes link again.
10. Verify that the correct web page opens in the default browser for the connected device.

11. Repeat steps 1–10 with a different device (e.g., if first test was with Osprey EB, repeat with Osprey CC, ensuring both devices are on firmware version 5039 or later and have an update available).
expected: Tapping the Release Notes link from both the Home screen DFU flow and the Settings screen DFU flow opens the correct, corresponding web page for the connected device (Osprey EB or Osprey CC) in the default browser.
